title: InboundEvent
description: Wire shape of a SINGLE inbound observability Envelope accepted by POST /v1/events (T5). This is the server's ACCEPTED-shape schema: the conformance tests drive malformed instances through the real handler validation path to prove it REJECTS them (T3 paradigm inverted to inbound; see PRD D3). All field names are camelCase, mirroring the client EventModels (kind/traceId/timestampMs/source/name/attributes), plus a server-required eventId idempotency key. The wire is UNSTABLE (PRD D9): not in the CONTRACTS frozen set until the client publishes and consumes it.
